name_en: Counter-verified【Top-tier Original】M81540 Full Leather Embossed Pocket Wallet Series. This pocket wallet pays tribute to Virgil Abloh's color philosophy. Taurillon leather embossed with the classic Monogram pattern, dyed in vivid bright colors, making it a colorful choice for Monogram lovers. 8 x 11 x 1 cm
